# Managed skip-globs file. Regenerated on every leak-guard refresh.
# For per-repo additions that should survive regen, see skip-globs.local.txt.
#
# Glob entries are matched against:
# 1. The repo-relative path (forward slashes)
# 2. The bare basename
# 3. The "<prefix>/**" form (directory prefix match)
#
# Defaults: generated test goldens that re-emit input verbatim and would
# otherwise re-trigger the very leaks we are scrubbing in source.

**/testdata/golden/**
